betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6DNT Nano Suit§f

§aThe ultimate power armor — nearly perfect protection with 1 GHE per piece of power capacity!§f

The §bDNT Nano Suit§f is the most superior power armor set in NTM. It has perfect protection against all damage types except explosions (which it blocks §e99%§f of).

§6Pieces§f:
§b• §bDNT Helmet§f (hbm:dnt_helmet)
§b• §bDNT Chestplate§f (hbm:dnt_plate)
§b• §bDNT Leggings§f (hbm:dnt_legs)
§b• §bDNT Boots§f (hbm:dnt_boots)

§6Crafting Requirements§f:
§b• Requires the full §bLunar Cybernetic Armor§f set as a base
§b• §e24§f §bDNT Compound Plates§f total (6 per piece)
  Made from Dineutronium Compound Plates in an anvil
§b• §bSpark Singularity§f — for the helmet
§b• §bBalls-O-Tron Coin§f — required component
§b• §bDemon Core§f — for power systems
§b• §bSingularity§f — for containment

§6Properties§f:
§b• Perfect protection (all damage except explosions: 99%)
§b• Requires §e1 GHE§f per piece of power
§b• The single most powerful armor set in the mod

§cWarning§f: The DNT Nano Suit consumes 1 GHE per piece! This is an enormous amount of power. You will need the FEnSU or similar massive storage to keep this armor charged. Without power, it provides no protection.

§eTip§f: The DNT Nano Suit is the ABSOLUTE LAST armor you should craft. It requires nearly everything: Lunar Armor (Satellites), Dineutronium (PA), Singularity, Balls-O-Tron Coin, and Demon Core. Only craft this after completing all other endgame goals!
